title: Packaging Profiles - Adding and assigning a packaging profile
workflow_title: Packaging Profiles - Adding and assigning a packaging profile
source: support.dish.co official article + live form inspection

steps.caption: In the DISH POS Backoffice, open General and select Packaging profiles.
Give the profile a name and enter the deposit price, e.g. EUR 0.15.
Enter the profile's sales name - this also appears in the DISH POS app and on the receipt.
Open the main menu Articles and select Product groups.
Use the editing icon to open the settings of a product group.
Under the section Package profile, use the drop-down menu and select the profile.
Click Save - the deposit profile now applies to each article in this product group.
To assign to a single article, go to Articles > Products, open it with the pencil, set its Package profile and Save.
Finally, send provisioning via General, the sub-category General, and Send.
